'''Grenadier Droids''' were [[Bomb/Legends|bomb]]-throwing [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that were deployed on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SEMP" />
